title: astracantha gummifera
intro: Astracantha gummifera, also known as gum acacia, is a thorny tree native to Africa and the Middle East, producing a gummy exudate from its bark. The medicinal properties of Astracantha gummifera lie in its ability to soothe digestive issues, act as an anti-inflammatory, and provide antibacterial and antiviral properties. The health benefits of using Astracantha gummifera include reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Astracantha gummifera include tea infusions, capsules, and gum powder, which can be used to alleviate various health issues due to its medicinal properties.
